hooks.name: SWF Auto UI Tests
hooks.description: When any SWF page, component, or API file is edited or created, automatically generate or update the corresponding Playwright UI tests in scrabblewordsfinder/tests/.

action.prompt: An SWF feature file was just modified. Review the change and update or create the relevant Playwright UI test in scrabblewordsfinder/tests/ to ensure the feature is fully covered. Match the existing test patterns — use @playwright/test, group with test.describe, and target the live site via baseURL. If a new feature was added, create tests for it. If existing behaviour changed, update the relevant spec file. Do NOT delete existing passing tests unless the feature was removed.
